textByHashes.70cb2fb739a492aac74f3ee26f755319353314ba: The skullball comes out of one of these four spawnholes. Just kick the ball through the middle of each goal, through the skeleton's feet.
textByHashes.b023fcf503cc6d1caf77b0f0934e90b837375cd1: There are 10 goals, which you must complete in order, and one final goal.
textByHashes.7d07e247c0c36b83ef7ac140cb7f83a369f08ef7: An arrow will point to your ball, just in case lots of people are using the course at the same time as yourself.
textByHashes.98aa2dd56359fa89793076f9136081a1279bd135: The better your time, the more agillity XP you will be awarded. The timer starts when you score your first goal.
textByHashes.69c51b8b567676933f20d45643d252ec3e18c57b: No problem, here's another one. You'll have to start from the beginning again, but the timer will be restarted too.
textByHashes.246bbf23fabe3e7d4715847aa96ec3f742236fc4: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!
